summary: Block 129: Visual Hierarchy Overhaul - All tests PASS. Composer buttons correctly styled with light honey cream (#FDE68A), dark text (#78350F), and 1px border. City and Postal Code fields completely removed from Settings. State dropdown conditional on US country. Near You displays full country names.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 129 visual hierarchy testing complete. All composer buttons (Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer) verified with: background #FDE68A (rgb 253, 230, 138), color #78350F (rgb 120, 53, 15), border 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05). Visual hierarchy confirmed: Buzz In button uses saturated orange gradient linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(255, 179, 0), rgb(255, 160, 0)) which is MORE saturated than composer buttons. Settings page verified: City and Postal Code fields do NOT exist. State dropdown appears only when country is US.
